title: Thoughtly Agent
description: Schema for the Thoughtly Agent (formerly Interview) object. Agents are AI voice or chat workflows configured in the Thoughtly agent builder.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Agent (also referred to as interview_id).

channel.description: Primary channel handled by the Agent.

phone_number.description: Phone number assigned to the Agent for inbound or outbound calls.

voice_id.description: Identifier of the voice (TTS) used by the Agent.

nodes.description: Decision-tree nodes that define the Agent's conversation flow.

variables.description: Variables referenced inside the Agent script.

outcomes.description: Labeled outcomes the Agent can classify a call into (e.g., booked, qualified, voicemail, DNQ).
